summary: Iteration 108 - LanguageContext JSON lazy-load and dealer.menu.* DE/FR translation matrix testing. All features PASS. Language switching via localStorage and reload properly loads TR/DE/FR translations for dealer menu items.

issues: Language toggle (TR/DE/FR buttons) not visible in header - controlled by corporate header config 'language_switcher' block which appears to be disabled in current config

test_methodology.dealer_menu_test: Set localStorage language + page reload to trigger lazy-load
test_methodology.reason: Language toggle in DealerLayoutV2 is conditionally shown based on corporate header config

critical_code_review_comments: LanguageContext JSON separation is implemented correctly with dynamic imports
dealer.menu.* namespace fully translated for DE and FR in respective JSON files
Language toggle visibility depends on hasCorporateBlock('row1', 'language_switcher') - may need to ensure corporate header config includes this block for dealer portal
context_for_next_testing_agent: LanguageContext now uses separate JSON files (tr.json, de.json, fr.json) with lazy-loading via dynamic imports. dealer.menu.* translations fully implemented for TR/DE/FR. Language switching works correctly - tested via localStorage setting + reload. DealerLayoutV2 language toggle visibility controlled by corporate header config.
